hero.title: C.O.Y. Tampa, Casa Del Alfarero
hero.copy: We are a Messianic congregation in Tampa, Florida. We observe Shabbat and the Biblical Feasts.

services.label: Friday night
services.description: Begin Shabbat with worship, prayer, and a sermon from our pastor.

services.label: Saturday morning
services.description: Gather with the congregation for our Chumash studies, worship, and fellowship.

services.label: Saturday afternoon
services.description: Continue Shabbat with an afternoon service led by our men's, women's, youth, or children's ministries.

about.heading: A place shaped by faith and family.
paragraphs: Casa Del Alfarero means the Potter's House. We are a Messianic congregation observing the Biblical Feasts, Shabbat, and a life of worship rooted in Scripture.
Whether you are visiting for the first time or looking for a congregation in Tampa, there is a seat for you here on Friday at 8:00 PM, Saturday at 11:00 AM, and Saturday at 3:30 PM.

contact.heading: Connect with us.
contact.cardText: Stay in the know about all our services and events.
